# kDNSServiceMaxDomainName | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceMaxDomainName ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceMaxDomainName)

-  kDNSServiceMaxDomainName 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceMaxDomainName

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceMaxDomainName: Int32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceMaxDomainName#Discussion)

Maximum length, in bytes, of a domain name represented as an *escaped* C string including the final trailing dot, and the terminating NULL at the end.
